name: Saline caadi ah (0.9% NaCl)
description: Dheecaan isotonic crystalloid. Loo isticmaalo soo noolaynta dareeraha faleebbaha. shoogga dhiigbaxa, si taxadir leh u isticmaal -- xaddi badan ayaa ka sii dara xinjirowga dhiigga (hyperchloremic acidosis, coagulopathy dilutional). Hoos-u-dhac la oggol yahay ayaa doorbiday dhex-gelidda dhaawacyada ilaa la xakameynayo dhiig-baxa.
indications: Soo kicinta dareeraha (iyada oo taxaddar leh shoogga dhiigbaxa)
Hypovolemia ee ka yimaada sababaha aan dhiigbaxa ahayn
dose: Hemorrhagic shock: Xadid ilaa 1L ugu badnaan oo la sugayo xakamaynta dhiigbaxa (hypotension ogolaan). Bartilmaameedka SBP 80-90 mmHg gudaha dhaawaca, 90 mmHg gudaha TBI. Hypovolemia aan dhiig-baxa ahayn: 500 ml boluses, dib u qiimee.
warnings: Cadadka waaweyni waxay keenaan hyperchloremic metabolic acidosis iyo xinjirowga dhiigga ee la isku qaso -- waxay ka sii daraysaa saddex-geesoodka halista ah ee dhaawaca.
Ringer's lactated (LR) ayaa loo door bidaa dib u soo kicinta dhaawacyada mug weyn.
Ha u kicin dib-u-soo-nooleynta gasha dhaawacyada jirka ka hor inta aan la xakameynin dhiig-baxa qalliinka (hypotension oggol yahay).

pediatric.dose: 20 ml/kg IV bolus, dib u qiimee. Ku celi ugu badnaan x3 (60 mL/kg) ka hor inta aanad tixgelinin wax soo saarka dhiigga.

obstetric.note: Dib-u-nooleynta caadiga ah ee dhiig-baxa umusha. Dib-u-soo-nooleynta dareeraha xoogga leh ee ku habboon dhiig-baxa dhalmada ka hor inta aan la helin wax-soo-saarka dhiigga.

source: JTS CPG: Damage Control Resuscitation / PHTLS
